input.testCaseTitle: Incorrect Action Buttons Displayed in SKU Update Workflow
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-392 reported defect: Incorrect Action Buttons Displayed in SKU Update Workflow
input.errorMessage: *Description:* The action button dropdown menus are not displaying the correct options for each user role, deviating from the prescribed workflow: * *Product Developer* should see only the *"Approve"* button, but currently sees *"SKU Enrichment Done"*. * *Product Manager* should see *"SKU Enrichment Done"* in the action dropdown (_after initial approval and enrichment step_), but currently sees *"Approve"*. * *"Update"* button must be removed from the Product Manager's action button in all…

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: SKU update workflow action availability was misconfigured across roles and statuses. Product Developer, Product Manager, and Product Head saw the wrong approve/update actions until the role-state action matrix was corrected.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.86. ui-regression is acceptable for visible wrong buttons; code-bug is acceptable if modeled as workflow-state logic.
